title: Tomes and Talismans
overview: Tomes & Talismans is a 1986 educational television series produced by Mississippi Public Broadcasting, consisting of thirteen 20-minute episodes presented as a dramatic serial story. Each episode defines, illustrates, and reviews specific library research concepts.

episodes.title: Tomes Entombed
episodes.overview:
Lesson: Overview of a library

As humanity prepares its final evacuation to the White Crystal Solar System, librarian Ms. Bookhart desperately searches for the final volume of a book series on Wipers. This volume will complete the knowledge repository being created for others to discover - the last human library.
